Title: Empty bug list message is generic
Description: When the bug list is empty the UI shows "No items"; it should show "No bugs yet" so reviewers know the app is working.

Title: Add button label is unclear
Description: The primary add button says "Add"; it should say "Add bug" on the bug dashboard.

Title: Closed bug should be ignored
Description: This row demonstrates filtering and should not be selected because it is already done.
